name: subagent-retrieval
description: Query interface for past subagent run summaries.

tools.name: get_recent_summaries
tools.description: Get recent run summaries, optionally filtered by agent.

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID to filter by.

tools.name: get_run_detail
tools.description: Get full trace for a specific run.

tools.name: search_runs
tools.description: Search past run outputs by keyword.

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID to filter by.
